hero.headline: The money system isn't broken. It just wasn't built for you.
hero.subheadline: Send money on diBoaS, instantly, for free. Grow it your way.

goalCalculator.microcopy: Start from $5. Change your plan anytime.

paragraphs.p1: My grandmother never had access to the financial tools that could have changed her life.
paragraphs.p2:
The system was and is still working as designed.
Just not for people like her. Like me. Like you.
paragraphs.p3: Access is locked behind high minimums, complicated words, and big financial institutions that didn't and still don't care about people with small savings.
paragraphs.p4: $10,000 to open an investment account. $25 a month just to keep a checking account open. That was the price of access.
paragraphs.p5:
New technology made it possible to bypass the gatekeepers.
I just had to build the door.

slide1.headline: Your mom needs it now. Not during business hours.
slide1.subtext: Send money to anyone on diBoaS. Anywhere in the world. In seconds. Free.

slide2.headline: You're paying hundreds a year in fees you don't even see.
slide2.subtext: No monthly charges. No surprise fees. No fine print. Just your money, working for you.

slide3.headline: Your savings account is paying you almost nothing. You know it.
slide3.subtext: Pick what fits your life, cautious or adventurous. Starting at $5. Adelaide watches your money so you don't have to.

howItWorks.microDisclosure: Examples shown are illustrative and do not represent actual users.

fees.title: What It Costs. All of It.
fees.painIntro: The average person pays hundreds of dollars a year in bank fees, transfer charges, and hidden spreads. Here's what it looks like with us.
fees.disclaimer: *diBoaS fee shown. Third-party network fees may apply (typically less than $0.01).
fees.example: A $100 investment costs $0 with diBoaS. Selling costs 39 cents.
fees.expandableToggle: Send money, buy and invest is free. But we do have fees. See all fees.
fees.footerLine: Every fee. On the table. Nothing else.

adding.difference: Cheaper than most apps charge to add money

sending.example: Send $50 to Mom: it costs less than a penny

buying.example: Invest $100: it costs less than a penny

swapping.example: It costs less than a penny

strategies.difference: Growth options your bank doesn't offer
strategies.example: Start a $100 strategy: $0. Closing costs 39 cents.

paragraphs.p1: Fair question. Here's the real answer:
paragraphs.p2: Investing is free. When you sell, we charge 0.39%. If you sell $100, we make 39 cents. The only way we earn more is if your money grows. And the fee never exceeds $25. Our incentives are aligned with yours.
paragraphs.p3: No monthly fees. No surprise charges. No withdrawal penalties.
paragraphs.p4: How? New technology removed the branches, the executives, and the legacy costs. We pass those savings to you.
paragraphs.p5: Is there risk? Yes. Your money isn't in a bank. It's working through new technology. That means it can grow more, but there's also real risk. We monitor 24/7 and we test every strategy against past crashes, but we can't guarantee returns, and anyone who says they can is lying.
paragraphs.p6: We win when you win. We show you both sides, the opportunities AND the risks, always.

paragraphs.p1: Architecture: diBoaS is built on open-source and decentralized infrastructure. This means every transaction is verifiable, every system is auditable, and your money moves without middlemen.
paragraphs.p2: Your wallet: Every user gets their own personal wallet with their own personal security key. diBoaS never sees, holds, or has access to your key. If diBoaS disappeared tomorrow, your money would still be yours.
paragraphs.p3: Security: Your wallet is secured so that no one, including diBoaS, can access your funds. Only you can authorize transactions. We only use audited and established protocols. Every strategy is tested against historical market crashes before it's offered to users. We monitor all positions 24/7. Transaction signing will always require your approval.
paragraphs.p4: Transparency: All fees are disclosed upfront. All risks are stated plainly. No hidden mechanics.

demo.transitionHook: Don't take our word for it.
demo.subtext: No signup. No real money. Just proof.
demo.ctaSecondary: See what your future self could become.

socialProof.subtext: We're starting small so we can take care of every person who joins.

paragraphs.p1: I grew up watching my grandmother Adelaide navigate a financial system that wasn't designed for her. She deserved better tools. So does everyone like her.
paragraphs.p2: diBoaS is being established in Berlin, Germany, building for people in the US, EU, Brazil, with plans to expand to additional markets. I've spent 20+ years working in Products and IT across Brazil, the US, Japan, and Germany. Now I'm building the financial tool I wish my grandmother had.

versionB.description:
Got an invite code? You're in as an Early Member, with your own badge and 5 invites.
No code? Join the priority list. We'll open more spots soon.

isBank.question: Is diBoaS a bank?
isBank.answer: No. diBoaS is a platform that helps you connect with financial opportunities. We don't manage your money or make decisions about your funds. Your wallet is secured so that only YOU can authorize transactions. We provide the tools, you make the decisions.

isForEveryone.question: Is diBoaS for everyone?
isForEveryone.answer:
No. If you want someone else to make financial decisions for you, that's not us. If you want a traditional bank with branches and paper statements, that's not us either.

diBoaS is for people who want control over their own money, transparency about costs, and access to opportunities that used to require $10,000 minimums. You don't need to understand everything right now, that's what we're here for. You just need to be willing to learn.

withdraw.question: Can I withdraw my money anytime?
withdraw.answer: Yes. Your money is yours. Withdraw to your bank account whenever you want. The fee is 0.48%, so cashing out $100 costs you 48 cents. There are no lock-up periods and no penalties. We process your withdrawal instantly. Bank transfer times may vary.

safety.question: Is my money safe?
safety.answer:
Your money is secured by you. Only you hold the keys, no one else can access your funds without your permission.

That said, this isn't a bank account. Crypto-assets aren't covered by deposit guarantee schemes. The value of your assets can fluctuate, and you could lose some or all of your investment.

We show you both sides, the opportunities and the risks, always.

howPossible.question: How is this possible without high fees?
howPossible.answer: By cutting out the middlemen, the branches, the executives, the legacy costs. New financial technology does the same job at a fraction of the price. We pass those savings to you. That's the entire model.

minimum.question: What's the minimum amount to start?
minimum.answer: $5. That's a coffee. Most investment platforms require $500 to $10,000 just to open the door. We think that's part of the problem.

justTransfers.question: Can I just use diBoaS for transfers?
justTransfers.answer: Yes. Absolutely. You can use diBoaS only for sending and receiving money, free, instant, worldwide. The investing and growth features are there when and if you ever want them. No pressure. No package deals.

understanding.question: What if I don't understand investing?
understanding.answer: That's exactly who we built this for. Our goal is to make it so simple that anyone can do it. No jargon. No complicated decisions. Just clear options and transparent information. Start with $5. Explore. Learn. We're here every step.

whatIfWrong.question: What if something goes wrong?
whatIfWrong.answer: The technology we use carries real risk. Returns can go up or down. The systems aren't perfect, no system is. We monitor 24/7, and we test every strategy against past crashes (COVID, FTX, Terra) before we offer it. We'll always tell you what's happening. But we can't eliminate all risk, and anyone who says they can is lying.

shutdown.question: What happens to my money if diBoaS shuts down?
shutdown.answer: Your money is in YOUR wallet. Not ours. If diBoaS disappeared tomorrow, you would still have your funds, accessible through your wallet keys. We never hold your money. We never can. That's not a feature we added. It's how the whole system was built.

audited.question: Has diBoaS been audited?
audited.answer: We're a pre-launch platform. Our strategies are stress-tested against historical crashes and real-world scenarios, and we use audited, established protocols. As we grow, we plan to pursue independent third-party audits. For full details on the protocols and technology behind each strategy, visit our Strategies and Protocols pages.

afterSignup.question: What happens after I sign up?
afterSignup.answer:
You'll receive an email with your Founding Member badge and number, your personal invite link (5 invites to share), and instructions to get started.

From there, you set up your wallet, add funds, and you're in.

footer.tagline: Open access and fair opportunities for everyone.

disclosures.general: This content is for educational purposes only and does not constitute investment advice, financial advice, or any other type of advice. Past performance is not indicative of future results. Any historical data or simulations are hypothetical and not guarantees.
disclosures.crypto: The value of crypto-assets may fluctuate. You may lose some or all of your money. Crypto-assets are not covered by deposit guarantee schemes.
disclosures.stories: Testimonials on this page are illustrative examples and do not represent real users.
disclosures.ai: Certain content on this platform, including market analysis and educational materials, is generated or assisted by artificial intelligence. AI-generated content may contain errors or limitations. Users should verify information independently before making financial decisions.
disclosures.micaArticle7: This crypto-asset marketing communication has not been reviewed or approved by any competent authority in any Member State of the European Union. The offeror of the crypto-asset is solely responsible for the content of this crypto-asset marketing communication.
disclosures.us: diBoaS is a non-custodial interface providing access to decentralized finance protocols. diBoaS is not registered with the SEC, CFTC, FinCEN, or any state regulatory agency. US regulatory treatment of DeFi is evolving. You are responsible for determining whether your use of this interface complies with applicable laws.
disclosures.closing: You decide what's best for your situation.
